1	# typed: false
     2	
     3	class InboxController < ApplicationController
     4	  before_action :require_logged_in_user
     5	  before_action :set_page, only: [:all]
     6	  after_action :update_read_at, only: [:unread]
     7	
     8	  def index
     9	    if @user.inbox_count > 0
    10	      redirect_to inbox_unread_path
    11	    else
    12	      redirect_to inbox_all_path
    13	    end
    14	  end
    15	
    16	  def all
    17	    notifications_per_page = 25
    18	
    19	    @notifications = @user
    20	      .notifications
    21	      .offset((@page - 1) * notifications_per_page)
    22	      .limit(notifications_per_page)
    23	      .order(created_at: :desc)
    24	      .preload(user: [:hidings, :votes], notifiable: {story: [:tags, :user], user: [:comments], author: [], parent_comment: []})
    25	    apply_current_vote
    26	
    27	    @has_more = @user.notifications.count > (@page * notifications_per_page)
    28	
    29	    respond_to do |format|
    30	      format.html
    31	      format.json { render json: @notifications }
    32	    end
    33	  end
    34	
    35	  def unread
    36	    @notifications = @user
    37	      .notifications
    38	      .where(read_at: nil)
    39	      .order(created_at: :desc)
    40	      .preload(user: [:hidings, :votes], notifiable: {story: [:tags, :user], user: [:comments], author: [], parent_comment: []})
    41	    apply_current_vote
    42	
    43	    respond_to do |format|
    44	      format.html { render :all }
    45	      format.json { render json: @notifications }
    46	    end
    47	  end
    48	
    49	  private
    50	
    51	  def update_read_at
    52	    @notifications.where(read_at: nil).touch_all(:read_at)
    53	  end
    54	
    55	  def set_page
    56	    @page = params[:page].to_i
    57	    if @page == 0
    58	      @page = 1
    59	    elsif @page < 0 || @page > (2**32)
    60	      raise ActionController::RoutingError.new("page out of bounds")
    61	    end
    62	  end
    63	
    64	  def apply_current_vote
    65	    comment_notifications = @notifications.filter { |n| n.notifiable_type == "Comment" }.map(&:notifiable)
    66	    comment_notifications = CommentVoteHydrator.new(comment_notifications, @user)
    67	  end
    68	end

content.content:
1	# typed: false
     2	
     3	require "rails_helper"
     4	
     5	describe InboxController do
     6	  let(:author) { create(:user) }
     7	  let(:recipient) { create(:user) }
     8	
     9	  describe "GET all" do
    10	    it "marks the notification and associated message as read" do
    11	      unread_message = create(:message, recipient: recipient, author: author)
    12	      unread_notification = recipient.notifications.create(notifiable: unread_message)
    13	      read_message = create(:message, recipient: recipient, author: author)
    14	      read_at = Time.utc(2025, 1, 1)
    15	      read_notification = recipient.notifications.create(notifiable: read_message, read_at: read_at)
    16	      stub_login_as recipient
    17	      get :all
    18	      unread_message.reload
    19	      unread_notification.reload
    20	      read_notification.reload
    21	
    22	      # Notification read
    23	      expect(unread_notification.read_at).to_not be_nil
    24	      expect(unread_notification.read_at).to be > read_at
    25	
    26	      # Already read notification reamins unchanged, ie read_at is not updated
    27	      expect(read_notification.read_at).to eq read_at
    28	    end
    29	
    30	    it "marks the notification as read even if notification is not displayed" do
    31	      unread_comment = create(:comment, user: author, comment: "@#{author.username}")
    32	      unread_notification = author.notifications.create(notifiable: unread_comment)
    33	
    34	      stub_login_as author
    35	      # Disable mention notifications, so that notification is not displayed
    36	      author.settings["inbox_mentions"] = false
    37	      author.save!
    38	      unread_notification.reload
    39	      expect(unread_notification.should_display?).to eq(false)
    40	
    41	      get :all
    42	      unread_notification.reload
    43	      expect(unread_notification.read_at).to_not be_nil
    44	    end
    45	
    46	    it "does not update read_at of notification, when notification is not displayed" do
    47	      unread_comment = create(:comment, user: author, comment: "@#{author.username}")
    48	      read_at = Time.utc(2025, 1, 1)
    49	      notification = author.notifications.create(notifiable: unread_comment, read_at: read_at)
    50	
    51	      stub_login_as author
    52	      # Disable mention notifications, so that notification is not displayed
    53	      author.settings["inbox_mentions"] = false
    54	      author.save!
    55	      notification.reload
    56	      expect(notification.should_display?).to eq(false)
    57	
    58	      get :all
    59	      notification.reload
    60	      # Already read notification remains unchanged, ie read_at is not updated
    61	      expect(notification.read_at).to eq read_at
    62	    end
    63	  end
    64	end

     8	
     9	  describe "GET all" do
    10	    it "marks the notification and associated message as read" do
    11	      unread_message = create(:message, recipient: recipient, author: author)
    12	      unread_notification = recipient.notifications.create(notifiable: unread_message)
    13	      read_message = create(:message, recipient: recipient, author: author)
    14	      read_at = Time.utc(2025, 1, 1)
    15	      read_notification = recipient.notifications.create(notifiable: read_message, read_at: read_at)
    16	      stub_login_as recipient
    17	      get :all
    18	      unread_message.reload
    19	      unread_notification.reload
    20	      read_notification.reload
    21	
    22	      # Notification read
    23	      expect(unread_notification.read_at).to_not be_nil
    24	      expect(unread_notification.read_at).to be > read_at
    25	
    26	      # Already read notification reamins unchanged, ie read_at is not updated
    27	      expect(read_notification.read_at).to eq read_at
    28	    end
    29	
    30	    it "marks the notification as read even if notification is not displayed" do
    31	      unread_comment = create(:comment, user: author, comment: "@#{author.username}")
    32	      unread_notification = author.notifications.create(notifiable: unread_comment)
    33	
    34	      stub_login_as author
    35	      # Disable mention notifications, so that notification is not displayed
    36	      author.settings["inbox_mentions"] = false
    37	      author.save!
    38	      unread_notification.reload
    39	      expect(unread_notification.should_display?).to eq(false)
    40	
    41	      get :all
    42	      unread_notification.reload
    43	      expect(unread_notification.read_at).to_not be_nil
    44	    end
    45	
    46	    it "does not update read_at of notification, when notification is not displayed" do
    47	      unread_comment = create(:comment, user: author, comment: "@#{author.username}")
    48	      read_at = Time.utc(2025, 1, 1)
    49	      notification = author.notifications.create(notifiable: unread_comment, read_at: read_at)
    50	
    51	      stub_login_as author
    52	      # Disable mention notifications, so that notification is not displayed
    53	      author.settings["inbox_mentions"] = false
    54	      author.save!
    55	      notification.reload
    56	      expect(notification.should_display?).to eq(false)
    57	
    58	      get :all
    59	      notification.reload
    60	      # Already read notification remains unchanged, ie read_at is not updated
    61	      expect(notification.read_at).to eq read_at
    62	    end
    63	  end
    64	end

tool_use_result.originalFile:
# typed: false

class InboxController < ApplicationController
  before_action :require_logged_in_user
  before_action :set_page, only: [:all]
  after_action :update_read_at, only: [:unread]

  def index
    if @user.inbox_count > 0
      redirect_to inbox_unread_path
    else
      redirect_to inbox_all_path
    end
  end

  def all
    notifications_per_page = 25

    @notifications = @user
      .notifications
      .offset((@page - 1) * notifications_per_page)
      .limit(notifications_per_page)
      .order(created_at: :desc)
      .preload(user: [:hidings, :votes], notifiable: {story: [:tags, :user], user: [:comments], author: [], parent_comment: []})
    apply_current_vote

    @has_more = @user.notifications.count > (@page * notifications_per_page)

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html
      format.json { render json: @notifications }
    end
  end

  def unread
    @notifications = @user
      .notifications
      .where(read_at: nil)
      .order(created_at: :desc)
      .preload(user: [:hidings, :votes], notifiable: {story: [:tags, :user], user: [:comments], author: [], parent_comment: []})
    apply_current_vote

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html { render :all }
      format.json { render json: @notifications }
    end
  end

  private

  def update_read_at
    @notifications.where(read_at: nil).touch_all(:read_at)
  end

  def set_page
    @page = params[:page].to_i
    if @page == 0
      @page = 1
    elsif @page < 0 || @page > (2**32)
      raise ActionController::RoutingError.new("page out of bounds")
    end
  end

  def apply_current_vote
    comment_notifications = @notifications.filter { |n| n.notifiable_type == "Comment" }.map(&:notifiable)
    comment_notifications = CommentVoteHydrator.new(comment_notifications, @user)
  end
end

content.text:
All 3 examples pass now.

**Root cause:** `InboxController`'s `after_action :update_read_at` only ran `only: [:unread]`, so hitting the `all` action never marked notifications as read.

**Fix** (`app/controllers/inbox_controller.rb:6`): added `:all` to the callback's action list:

```ruby
after_action :update_read_at, only: [:all, :unread]
```

This also fixed a second, previously-failing test in the same file ("marks the notification as read even if notification is not displayed") that had the same root cause. The change is uncommitted in the working tree.

result:
All 3 examples pass now.

**Root cause:** `InboxController`'s `after_action :update_read_at` only ran `only: [:unread]`, so hitting the `all` action never marked notifications as read.

**Fix** (`app/controllers/inbox_controller.rb:6`): added `:all` to the callback's action list:

```ruby
after_action :update_read_at, only: [:all, :unread]
```

This also fixed a second, previously-failing test in the same file ("marks the notification as read even if notification is not displayed") that had the same root cause. The change is uncommitted in the working tree.
